item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately refuses to add the parking reminder as another local patch, names the repeated pattern across wrong entrance, missing names, tea-break queueing, and parking questions, and moves upstream to a single owner for the guest-arrival journey. It does not supply SMS copy, placement, checklist, or any implementation detail for the requested parking reminder."}
